basic_details.job_title: IMSc Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technical Assistant, Library Trainee and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The Institute of Mathematical Sciences (IMSc), Chennai
basic_details.post_name: Project Scientific Officer "D", Project Assistant/ Associate, Technical Assistant (Systems), System Trainee, Library Trainee
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Mathematical Sciences (IMSc), Chennai - an autonomous institution under the Department of Atomic Energy (DAE), Government of India - has released Advertisement No. 02-R/IMSc/2026, dated 17 July 2026. The notification invites applications for a Project Scientific Officer "D", a Project Assistant/ Associate, a Technical Assistant (Systems), two System Trainee positions, and two Library Trainee positions.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 17 July 2026 Last Date for Applications (all posts): 30 July 2026, up to 2400 hrs Written Test / Interview Dates: Not fixed - "will be announced later" on IMSc's Opportunities page

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: PhD in Science/ Math/ Education + 5 yrs experience
Bachelor's/ Master's in Science/ CS/ IT/ Engineering, min 60%
Bachelor's in Science/ Engineering, min 60%, passed out 2024-2026 only
MLISc, first class, passed out 2025/ 2026 only

qualification.details: Project Scientific Officer "D": PhD in Science/ Math/ Education + 5 yrs experience | Project Assistant/Associate: Bachelor's/ Master's/ PhD | Technical Assistant (Systems): Bachelor's/ Master's in Science/ CS/ IT/ Engineering, min 60% | System Trainee: Bachelor's in Science/ Engineering, min 60%, passed out 2024-2026 only | Library Trainee: MLISc, first class, passed out 2025/ 2026 only

vacancy_details.Project/Section: Vigyan Pratibha Project (based at IIT Palakkad)
Centre for Science Communication and Outreach

vacancy_details.Consolidated Salary/Stipend (per month): Rs. 32,500/- (up to Rs. 48,000/- for exceptional candidates)

post_wise_breakdown.project_section: Vigyan Pratibha Project (based at IIT Palakkad)
Centre for Science Communication and Outreach

post_wise_breakdown.consolidated_salary_stipend_per_month: Rs. 32,500/- (up to Rs. 48,000/- for exceptional candidates)

selection_process: Project Scientific Officer / Project Assistant: Shortlisting + online interview Technical Assistant (Systems): Written/hands-on test + personal interview System Trainee: Written test → hands-on test → interview (same day) Library Trainee: Screening test → personal interview
how_to_apply: Project Scientific Officer: Email CV + cover letter to [email protected] with correct subject line
Project Assistant/Associate: Email to [email protected] with writing samples
Technical Assistant/System Trainee: Apply online at imsc.res.in/ta_systems
Library Trainee: Apply online at imsc.res.in/tr_lib
important_instructions: Late emails not considered; hard copies/post/courier not accepted Resume must be attached or application is rejected Only shortlisted candidates' names displayed on website - no separate call letters (except Library Trainee) All posts are contractual/ temporary - no claim to regularization or absorption Canvassing leads to disqualification; Director's decision is final

faq.question: Q1. What is IMSc Recruitment 2026 Advt No. 02-R/IMSc/2026?
faq.answer: It is an official notification dated 17 July 2026 issued by The Institute of Mathematical Sciences (IMSc), Chennai, inviting applications for five posts: Project Scientific Officer "D," Project Assistant/Associate, Technical Assistant (Systems), System Trainee, and Library Trainee.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IMSc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for all five posts is 30 July 2026, up to 2400 hrs. Applications received after this deadline will not be considered under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in IMSc Chennai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 7 total vacancies: 1 Project Scientific Officer "D," 1 Project Assistant/Associate, 1 Technical Assistant (Systems), 2 System Trainee, and 2 Library Trainee posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for IMSc System Trainee and Library Trainee posts?
faq.answer: System Trainees receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 22,000/- per month, while Library Trainees receive Rs. 24,000/- per month, both all-inclusive during the training period.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IMSc System Trainee and Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: For System Trainee, candidates must be between 18 and 25 years. For Library Trainee, the maximum age is 27 years, both as on the last date of receipt of application.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for IMSc Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The official notification does not mention any application fee for any of the five posts.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the IMSc Technical Assistant (Systems) or System Trainee post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online at https://www.imsc.res.in/ta_systems before 2400 hrs on 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification required for IMSc Project Scientific Officer "D"?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. in Science, Mathematics, or Science/Mathematics Education (or a related field) along with 5 years of relevant experience in research, science communication, or teaching.
